ds :i esa muds v/;{k ,oa lfpo] ,d o"kZ dh vof/k ds fy;s ¼19½ dqyifr }kjk ukefufnZ"V rhu iwoZ Nk= (5) ¼3½ lHkk ds lHkh lnL;] insu lnL;ksa vkSj Nk=ksa dk çfrfufèkRo djus okys lnL;ksa ds vykok] rhu o"kZ dh vofèk ds fy, in èkkj.k djsaxs izks- 'kSysUnz dqekj] dqylfpo [foKkiu&III@4@vlk-@280@19] GURU GHASIDAS VISHWAVIDYALAYA, BILASPUR [A Central University established by the Central Universities Act, 2009 (No. 25 of 2009)] NOTIFICATION Bilaspur, the 4th November, 2019 S. No. 307/Academic/2019.—This is to notify for the information of all concerned that Hon’ble President of India in his capacity as the Visitor of the Guru Ghasidas Vishwavidyalaya, in exercise of powers conferred upon him by the provisions given in Section 27(3) of the Central Universities Act, 2009 [No. 25 of 2009], has been pleased to approve the proposed amendments in the Statute 10(5) of the Act relating to the -- 2 of 4 -- ¹Hkkx IIIμ[k.M 4º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 3 constitution of the Court of the Guru Ghasidas Vishwavidyalaya, as conveyed by the Department of Higher Education, Ministry of Human Resource Development vide letter F.49-7/2016-CU.I (Part) dated 03.10.2019. Amendments in Statute 10(5) Existing Provision Amended Provisions (5) Eleven members of the Court shall form a quorum for a meeting of the Court. (5) (i) One third of the total members of the Court shall form a quorum for the meeting. (5) (ii) The Court shall consist of the following members, namely Ex-officio Members (1) Chancellor (2) Vice-Chancellor (3) Pro-Vice-Chancellor (4) Deans of Schools; (5) Dean of Students’ Welfare (6) Finance Officer (7) Controller of Examinations (8) Proctor (9) Librarian (10) Registrar - Member Secretary Representatives of Schools and Departments (11) Four Professors, who are not Deans of Schools, to be nominated by the Vice-Chancellor by rotation according to their seniority (12) Three Heads of the Departments, who are not Deans or Professors, to be nominated by the Vice-Chancellor by rotation according to their seniority (13) Two Associate Professors, who are not Deans/ Heads of the Departments, and two Assistant Professors, to be nominated by the Vice-Chancellor by rotation according to their seniority Representatives of learned personalities (14) Six representatives from Vice Chancellors or Eminent personalities to be nominated by the Vice Chancellor Persons representing learned professions and special interests (15) Six members representing learned professions and special interests including representatives of industry, commerce, banking and agriculture to be nominated by the Visitor -- 3 of 4 -- 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART III—SEC. 4] Other Members (16) Such members of the Executive Council, except Visitor’s nominees, who are not members of the Court, under any of the above category (17) Four representatives of Teaching and Non-Teaching staff, one from teaching staff and one each from Group A, B & C, of Non- Teaching staff to be elected from amongst themselves (18) President and Secretary as elected members of Student’s Council, for a period of one year (19) Three alumni to be nominated by the Vice-Chancellor 5 (iii) All members of the Court, other than Ex-Officio members and members representing students, shall hold office for a term of three years Prof. SHAILENDRA KUMAR, Registrar [ADVT.-III/4/Exty./280/19] Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 4 of 4 --
